home.heroSubtitle: The Next Generation of Smart Medical Education
home.heroDescription: HMA Medical Academy - The leading platform redefining medical education using the latest generative AI technologies.
home.featuresDescription: We don't just offer courses; we provide an integrated learning experience that evolves with you and understands your academic needs using AI.
home.feature1Desc: AI-generated explanations and videos accurately reviewed from global sources like PubMed and WHO.
home.feature2Desc: A unique visual experience with educational videos produced using the latest AI techniques to simplify complex concepts.
home.feature3Desc: Advanced algorithms analyze your level and suggest the most suitable content for your learning speed and personal needs.
home.feature4Desc: Get professional certificates with an official seal and signature immediately upon successfully passing the final exams.
